en: I can't worry about my problems I can't take them when I'm gone
One, here comes the two to the three to the four
Tell them bring another round, we need plenty more Two stepping on the table, she don't need a dance floor

They know me and J. Dale's got a history There's a party downtown near Fifth Street
Everybody at the bar get tips
I've been boozy since I left, I ain't changing for a check Tell my ma I ain't forget
Woke up drunk at 10 a.m., we gon' do this shit again Tell your girl to bring a friend, oh lord
